basic_details.job_title: Lakshadweep Administration Veterinary Assitant Surgeons Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Lakshadweep Administration, Department of Animal Husbandry
basic_details.job_location: Any Animal Husbandry Unit under Lakshadweep Administration (vacancy raised for Minicoy)
basic_details.short_information: The Department of Animal Husbandry under the Lakshadweep Administration has released an employment notice for the engagement of one Veterinary Assistant Surgeon on contract basis. Below is a quick summary of the recruitment.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 06.07.2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 21st July 2026, before 6 PM Interview Schedule: Third week of July 2026 (virtual mode) Exact Interview Date and Time Slot: To be intimated separately to shortlisted candidates via their registered personal email | Candidates are advised to keep checking their registered email regularly, as the exact interview date and time slot will be communicated only through this channel.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to rely only on the official notification for confirmation, as no fee details have been specified.

age_limit.age_details: Purely contractual, for a period of 11 months

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the Lakshadweep Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post must satisfy both the educational qualification and age limit criteria mentioned below.

salary_details.details: The selected Veterinary Assistant Surgeon will be paid a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- (Fifty Thousand) per month. No other allowances, including travelling allowance for joining or TA/DA for attending the interview, will be paid.

selection_process: Selection for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post will be based on a virtual interview. Key points of the selection process include:

Interviews will be conducted in virtual mode during the third week of July 2026. The exact date and time slot will be communicated individually to shortlisted candidates. The interview board will recommend a select/merit list. Future vacancies arising during the 11-month period
or during a subsequent 11-month re-engagement period
may be filled from the same merit list
based on candidate performance and departmental requirement. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
how_to_apply: Eligible and willing candidates need to follow these steps to apply:

Download and fill the prescribed Application Form (Annexure A), which requires details such as full name, parent's name, date of birth and age, permanent address, communication address, email ID, contact number, educational qualification details, and Veterinary Council registration details.
Attach self-attested copies of all supporting documents mentioned in the required documents section.
Sign the declaration confirming that the information furnished is true and correct.
Send the completed application along with supporting documents to the official email ID: [email protected]
Ensure the application reaches the department on or before 6 PM, 21st July 2026.
Candidates should provide an active and regularly checked personal email address in the application form, since the interview link and schedule will be shared only through this email.
important_instructions: The engagement is purely contractual for a period of 11 months. Re-engagement of the same candidate may be considered based on performance and departmental requirement. The selected candidate may be posted to any Animal Husbandry Unit under Lakshadweep Administration. No travelling allowance will be paid for joining, and no TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Applications without supporting documents will be rejected. Selected candidates will have no right or claim to regular service based on this contractual engagement. The Department of Animal Husbandry is empowered to terminate the engagement at any time without assigning any reason. Selected candidates must enter into an agreement in the prescribed proforma and adhere to all departmental instructions and guidelines. The Department reserves the right to cancel this notification at any time without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Lakshadweep Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Department of Animal Husbandry, Lakshadweep Administration, Kavaratti, inviting applications for one Veterinary Assistant Surgeon (VAS) post on a purely contractual basis for a period of 11 months. content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The Department of Animal Husbandry under the Lakshadweep Administration has released an employment notice for the engagement of one Veterinary Assistant Surgeon on contract basis. Below is a quick summary of the recruitment.

rows.details: Lakshadweep Administration, Department of Animal Husbandry

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 06.07.2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 21st July 2026, before 6 PM Interview Schedule: Third week of July 2026 (virtual mode) Exact Interview Date and Time Slot: To be intimated separately to shortlisted candidates via their registered personal email Candidates are advised to keep checking their registered email regularly, as the exact interview date and time slot will be communicated only through this channel.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The Lakshadweep Administration has notified one vacancy for the post of Veterinary Assistant Surgeon. Although this recruitment has been initiated to fill a vacancy created in Minicoy, the selected candidate may be posted to any Animal Husbandry Unit within the Union Territory of Lakshadweep, depending on administrative requirements.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Lakshadweep Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post must satisfy both the educational qualification and age limit criteria mentioned below.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The selected Veterinary Assistant Surgeon will be paid a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- (Fifty Thousand) per month. No other allowances, including travelling allowance for joining or TA/DA for attending the interview, will be paid.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to rely only on the official notification for confirmation, as no fee details have been specified.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration VAS Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post will be based on a virtual interview. Key points of the selection process include: Interviews will be conducted in virtual mode during the third week of July 2026. The exact date and time slot will be communicated individually to shortlisted candidates. The interview board will recommend a select/merit list. Future vacancies arising during the 11-month period, or during a subsequent 11-month re-engagement period, may be filled from the same merit list, based on candidate performance and departmental requirement. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep VAS Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Applications submitted without supporting documents will be rejected. Candidates must attach self-attested copies of the following along with the application form: Proof of educational qualifications and mark sheets (B.V.Sc. degree) Valid Veterinary Council registration certificate Caste certificate (if applicable) Proof of age (date of birth certificate) Proof of experience (if applicable) Selected candidates must produce all original certificates at the time of joining for verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Lakshadweep VAS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible and willing candidates need to follow these steps to apply: Download and fill the prescribed Application Form (Annexure A), which requires details such as full name, parent's name, date of birth and age, permanent address, communication address, email ID, contact number, educational qualification details, and Veterinary Council registration details. Attach self-attested copies of all supporting documents mentioned in the required documents section. Sign the declaration confirming that the information furnished is true and correct. Send the completed application along with supporting documents to the official email ID: [email protected] Ensure the application reaches the department on or before 6 PM, 21st July 2026. Candidates should provide an active and regularly checked personal email address in the application form, since the interview link and schedule will be shared only through this email.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep VAS Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The engagement is purely contractual for a period of 11 months. Re-engagement of the same candidate may be considered based on performance and departmental requirement. The selected candidate may be posted to any Animal Husbandry Unit under Lakshadweep Administration. No travelling allowance will be paid for joining, and no TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Applications without supporting documents will be rejected. Selected candidates will have no right or claim to regular service based on this contractual engagement. The Department of Animal Husbandry is empowered to terminate the engagement at any time without assigning any reason. Selected candidates must enter into an agreement in the prescribed proforma and adhere to all departmental instructions and guidelines. The Department reserves the right to cancel this notification at any time without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the salary of a Veterinary Assistant Surgeon in Lakshadweep?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- per month, with no other allowances payable.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for Lakshadweep VAS recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should not be more than 55 years of age as on 31.07.2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for the Lakshadweep VAS post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email on or before 6 PM, 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What educational qualification is required?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.) from a recognised university, along with valid registration with the Veterinary Council of India or the concerned State/UT Veterinary Council.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates know their interview schedule?
faq.answer: The exact date and time slot for the virtual interview will be communicated individually to shortlisted candidates through the personal email address provided in their application form.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. This is a purely contractual engagement for 11 months. Selected candidates will not have any right or claim to regular service based on this appointment.
